Vendored from Tailwind Labs Heroicons.

- Source: https://github.com/tailwindlabs/heroicons
- Version: v2.2.0
- Commit: 0435d4ca364a608cc75e2f8683d374e55abbae26
- License: MIT

Only the `optimized` SVG directory is vendored here. The Tailwind config reads
these static SVG files directly when generating `hero-*` icon classes.
